title: Fomat a mail in a email
excerpt: I need format the text inside on a mail. My format is dd/mm/yyyy but in the text of mail sent remains 18Th April…(US FORMAT)

posts.author: MarceloTorres (MarceloTorres)
posts.cookedHtml: I need format the text inside on a mail. My format is dd/mm/yyyy but in the text of mail sent remains 18Th April…(US FORMAT)

posts.author: IzzyD (Izzy)
posts.cookedHtml: You want it to be changed automatically?

posts.author: MarceloTorres (MarceloTorres)
posts.cookedHtml:
The field on MOnday view it´s ok. But in the mail sent in automation the format ins´t ok, I need to know how i format the date in the mail automation.

Exemple: date in Board 23/04/24 but inside the mail sent in automation the format is April 23rd 2024.(US FORMAT)
